name: ts-sql-query
description: Type-safe SQL query builder like QueryDSL or JOOQ in Java or Linq in .Net for TypeScript with MariaDB, MySql, Oracle, PostgreSql, Sqlite and SqlServer support.
author: juanluispaz

scripts.generate-prisma: prisma generate --schema src/examples/prisma/postgresql.prisma; prisma generate --schema src/examples/prisma/mysql.prisma; prisma generate --schema src/examples/prisma/mariadb.prisma; prisma generate --schema src/examples/prisma/sqlite.prisma; prisma generate --schema src/examples/prisma/sqlserver.prisma
scripts.build: rm -rf dist/*; tsc --version && tsc && npm run copy-prisma
scripts.dist: npm run build && cp LICENSE.md package.json README.md dist && cd dist && rm -Rf examples && npm publish
scripts.dist-alpha: npm run build && cp LICENSE.md package.json README.md dist && cd dist && rm -Rf examples && npm publish --tag alpha
scripts.dist-beta: npm run build && cp LICENSE.md package.json README.md dist && cd dist && rm -Rf examples && npm publish --tag beta
scripts.test-dist: npm run build && cp LICENSE.md package.json README.md dist && cd dist && rm -Rf examples && npm publish --dry-run
